archetype.name: Knight Reclaimant
archetype.note: This archetype offers Scout's Warning at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Scout's Warning
feat.text: You visually or audibly warn your allies of danger, granting them each a +1 circumstance bonus to their initiative rolls, or a +2 circumstance bonus if you're using the Scout exploration activity. Depending on whether you use gestures or call out, this action gains either the visual or the auditory trait, respectively.

traits.name: Ranger
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the ranger class.

traits.name: Rogue
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the rogue class.

feat.trigger: You are about to roll a Perception or Survival check for initiative

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
